emergency_definition: No cooling in extreme heat (above 95 degrees) or no heat when it's below 40, or anything with gas smell or CO alarm, or if an elderly or medically vulnerable person is in the home with no heat or cooling in extreme weather

non_emergency_routing_rules.action: Take name and number, promise callback within one business day
Take name, phone number, and short description, confirm callback next business day by 10am

call_transfer_rules.fallback: Mention maintenance agreement plan for priority scheduling and discounts

integration_constraints.notes: Future integration to log call info, revisit in sixty days

after_hours_flow_summary: Route to 24/7 emergency line at 713-555-0183, or take name and number for non-emergency calls and confirm callback next business day
notes: Thirty percent of customers are Spanish-speaking, ideal if agent can greet in English and Spanish and switch if needed
Filter out vendor solicitations and warranty scam calls
Mention maintenance agreement plan for priority scheduling and discounts when caller inquires about service repair
